entries.description: 240-row deterministic sample derived from real Q1 transactions in UCI Online Retail II (CC-BY-4.0), with dates relabelled to 2024 and realistic multi-currency store rows added for reconciliation.
Daily Q1 2024 FX table for converting each native-currency order row to USD by currency and fx_date.

note: Hybrid real-data task: base transaction mix comes from UCI Online Retail II; added FX and store-currency variation make the spreadsheet conversion/reconciliation realistic without exposing proprietary retail data.
